summary: Full scene flow trace — 10 checks, 3 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 3 PASS

Director decision q-20260414-005: delete both. Both .tscn and .gd files still present. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES exists in queue but not yet executed.

GameFlowController NOT autoload, NOT instantiated in any active scene. Director q-20260414-004: migrate active path to GFC. ARCH-GAMEFLOW-UNWIRED exists. The full Hub->Run->EndScreen signal pipeline is dead code.
Continue button routes directly to HubAntre.tscn bypassing SelectionSauvegarde. Player cannot resume from saved run state via main menu Continue.
Profile IS loaded via store.dispatch(LOAD_PROFILE) ✓. BUT GAME_SCENE = HubAntre always. No routing to BroceliandeForest3D for active run_state. run_state interruption resume not implemented.

store_run.check_run_end() correctly returns faction_endings_available for rep>=80 ✓. MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings() works ✓. BUT faction_ending_chosen signal never connected in active path (GameFlowController dead). Faction endings computed but never acted upon.
